test_cases.input_summary: Translating a dense paragraph from a central bank monetary policy statement into plain language for a general news audience
test_cases.notes: Every piece of central banking jargon was identified and accurately translated. The rewrite preserved the policy implications without distortion. Trade-off notes were genuinely useful — flagged where simplification lost important nuance.

test_cases.input_summary: Translating legal language from a court ruling on data privacy into plain English for a technology news article
test_cases.notes: Legal Latin and procedural terms were well-handled. The distinction between the ruling's legal significance and its practical impact was preserved. One-sentence summary was usable as a headline.

test_cases.input_summary: Translating a technical passage from a climate science report about carbon cycle feedback mechanisms for a documentary script
test_cases.notes: Scientific concepts were translated without dumbing down. The feedback loop concept was explained with an effective analogy. Trade-off flag correctly noted where the simplified version lost quantitative precision.
